banner.title: Use the links below to view the documentation, report issues or send feedback

placeholderFormat.name: Date Format for Natural Dates and Daily Notes
placeholderFormat.desc: Depending on the selected option, date placeholders will resolve to either Gregorian or Jalali dates.

askBeforeCreate.name: Confirm Before Creating Notes
askBeforeCreate.desc: When enabled, a confirmation dialog will appear before creating any note.

openDailyOnStartup.name: Open Today's Daily Note on Startup
openDailyOnStartup.desc: When enabled, Obsidian will automatically open today's daily note on launch.

showSeasons.name: Show Seasons in Calendar
showSeasons.desc: * This setting is ignored when the sidebar is too narrow.

daily.name: Daily Notes Folder
daily.desc: Daily notes will be created in this folder.

weekly.name: Weekly Notes Folder
weekly.desc: Weekly notes will be created in this folder.

monthly.name: Monthly Notes Folder
monthly.desc: Monthly notes will be created in this folder.

seasonal.name: Seasonal Notes Folder
seasonal.desc: Seasonal notes will be created in this folder.

yearly.name: Yearly Notes Folder
yearly.desc: Yearly notes will be created in this folder.

daily.name: Daily Note Naming Format
daily.desc: * Using a Gregorian format is recommended for better compatibility with other plugins.

weekCalculation.name: Week Calculation Mode
weekCalculation.desc: Controls how the first week of the year and week numbers are determined.

options.firstDayOfYear: By first day of jalali year
options.gregorianFirstDayOfYear: By first day of gregorian year

monthly.name: Monthly Note Naming
monthly.desc: Choose how monthly note files are named and recognized.

yearly.name: Yearly Note Naming
yearly.desc: Choose how yearly note files are named and recognized.

daily.name: Daily Note Template
daily.desc: Template used when creating daily notes.

weekly.name: Weekly Note Template
weekly.desc: Template used when creating weekly notes.

monthly.name: Monthly Note Template
monthly.desc: Template used when creating monthly notes.

seasonal.name: Seasonal Note Template
seasonal.desc: Template used when creating seasonal notes.

yearly.name: Yearly Note Template
yearly.desc: Template used when creating yearly notes.

showGregorian.name: Show Gregorian Calendar
showGregorian.desc: * This setting is ignored when the sidebar is too narrow.

showHijri.name: Show Hijri Calendar
showHijri.desc: * This setting is ignored when the sidebar is too narrow.

hijriBase.name: Hijri Calendar Base
hijriBase.desc: Hijri dates may vary depending on the selected reference.

showOfficial.name: Show Official Iranian Holidays
showOfficial.desc: Display official Iranian holidays in red within the calendar.

weekendDays.name: Weekend Days
weekendDays.desc: Select which days should be marked as weekly holidays.

confirmModal.title: Confirm Note Creation
confirmModal.message: Do you want to create this note?

error.dailyNotesUnavailable: Enable and configure Obsidian Daily Notes or the daily feature in Periodic Notes to use this integration.
error.dailyNoteCreationFailed: Obsidian Daily Notes could not create the daily note. Check its folder and template settings.
